base_url.description: Full Linear GraphQL endpoint URL override for tests or proxies. Must be the complete endpoint (including any path); unlike legacy, a bare-host override is NOT auto-suffixed with /graphql by this bundle (see docs.md Known limits). Defaults to https://api.linear.app/graphql.

api_key.description: Linear personal API key, sent as a bare Authorization header (no Bearer prefix). Provide either api_key or access_token.

access_token.description: Linear OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer Authorization header. Provide either api_key or access_token; access_token takes priority when both are set.

auth_type.description: Optional. Set to oauth or oauth2.0 to send api_key with a Bearer prefix instead of the default bare personal-API-key header (legacy's isOAuth config-forced-Bearer path). Not needed when access_token is set (access_token always uses Bearer regardless of this value).

page_size.description: GraphQL connection page size (1-250, Linear's own cap). Hooks-consumed; see docs.md Known limits.

max_pages.description: Optional hard cap on the number of pages read per stream. Empty, "all", or "unlimited" means unbounded (the default). Hooks-consumed; see docs.md Known limits.
